description: Intercom is a customer messaging platform that provides live chat, help desk, and customer engagement tools for businesses.
self_serve: Yes – includes a self‑serve help center and knowledge base
api_surface: Extensive – includes endpoints for Users, Companies, Conversations, Messages, Tags, Custom Attributes, etc.
buildability: High – offers SDKs for web, iOS, Android, and a comprehensive REST API
main_blocker: Rate limiting (100 requests/min) and OAuth flow complexity
